summary: Iteration 67 - CMS Roles & Permissions System: All 17 test scenarios passed. Backend API tests (13/13 passed) and Frontend UI tests (all critical flows verified). The feature is fully functional including role CRUD, member role assignment, permission-based sidebar filtering, 403 forbidden pages with sidebar intact, and admin regression.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: require_admin() is permission-aware - maps URL to section key via get_section_for_path() and checks effective_permissions
Backend: require_super_admin() is strict admin-only for role management endpoints
Backend: get_user_permissions() correctly unions permissions from all assigned CMS roles, handles full_access flag
Backend: System roles (role_admin, role_member) are protected from deletion with HTTP 400
Frontend: AdminLayout filters sidebar items based on user.effective_permissions - operators only see permitted sections
Frontend: CmsSectionGuard renders 403 panel inside AdminLayout so sidebar stays visible for navigation
Frontend: RolesManager has full CRUD with group checkboxes, Select All, and system role protection (disabled fields)
Frontend: MembersManager has CMS Roles column with inline assignment dialog

test_credentials.operator: carlos@example.com / Test123! (has Analyst role with dashboard, analytics, blog permissions)

seed_data_creation: Assigned Analyst role to carlos@example.com for operator testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 67 tested CMS Roles & Permissions feature. Key test results: (1) Admin login returns cms_roles=['role_admin'] and 42 effective_permissions, (2) GET /api/admin/cms-sections returns 41 sections (excludes admin_only roles_permissions), (3) GET /api/admin/cms-roles returns system roles + custom roles with member_count, (4) Role CRUD works - create/update/delete with system role protection, (5) PUT /api/admin/members/{id}/cms-roles assigns roles correctly, (6) Operator login returns correct cms_roles and effective_permissions, (7) Permission enforcement: operator gets 200 on permitted sections, 403 on unpermitted, (8) Admin-only routes protected from operators, (9) Frontend sidebar filters by effective_permissions, (10) 403 page shows inside AdminLayout with sidebar intact, (11) System roles have disabled name/full_access fields and no delete button, (12) Admin regression - full access to all pages. Carlos has Analyst role assigned.

backend_auth_me.operator_cms_roles: PASS - Returns cms_roles with assigned roles and matching effective_permissions

backend_cms_sections.excludes_admin_only: PASS - roles_permissions key is filtered out

backend_cms_roles_crud.list_roles: PASS - Returns system roles + custom roles with member_count
backend_cms_roles_crud.create_role: PASS - Creates role with validated permissions

backend_permission_enforcement.operator_denied_sections: PASS - 403 on services with 'Access denied to section: services'
backend_permission_enforcement.operator_denied_admin_only: PASS - 403 on cms-roles, cms-sections, role assignment

frontend_admin_sidebar.all_sections_visible: PASS - Admin sees all 42 sections + Security divider + Roles & Permissions

frontend_roles_manager.page_loads: PASS - Shows Administrator, Member, Analyst roles
frontend_roles_manager.new_role_button: PASS - Opens editor with permission matrix
frontend_roles_manager.group_checkboxes: PASS - Toggle whole group + individual sections
frontend_roles_manager.system_role_protection: PASS - Name/full_access disabled, no delete button

frontend_members_cms_roles.column_visible: PASS - CMS Roles column in table
frontend_members_cms_roles.assignment_dialog: PASS - Opens with checkbox list of all roles
frontend_members_cms_roles.save_assignment: PASS - Updates via PUT and refreshes chips

frontend_operator_login.sidebar_filtered: PASS - Only shows Dashboard, Analytics, Blog (Analyst permissions)
frontend_operator_login.unpermitted_hidden: PASS - Services, Settings, Roles & Permissions not visible

frontend_403_forbidden.sidebar_intact: PASS - Sidebar remains visible on 403 pages
frontend_403_forbidden.navigation_works: PASS - Can click Dashboard/Analytics/Blog to navigate away
